历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 32421 → 28457 → 28698 → 28781 → 28271, showing a slight upward trend with fluctuations over the past five years, with a baseline ranking of about 28271 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 1313 in 2021, 1319 in 2022, 1384 in 2023, 1475 in 2024, and 1494 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 1540, an increase of about 3.1% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, reflecting the school's increasing comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management (school management or response incidents), which are at the campus life management level and have limited impact on application willingness; Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms and acceptable attention; no records of admission cut-off gaps; Education A, Psychology A, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding teacher training and psychology disciplines, directly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Education (Yan Yangchu Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Psychology, and Ideological and Political Education, which are attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Southwest University's Physics Category offers popular majors like Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, aligning with current major popularity trends; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 129,600 (calculated at approximately 62% of total), a decrease of about 7.1% from 139,500 in 2025, significantly reducing the examinee scale and easing competition pressure; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff is 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Southwest University is located in Chongqing, a local university with a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates; in 2025, the university enrolled about 15 people in Chongqing (approximately 1,744 total for Physics and History categories), with a very high local enrollment proportion, leading to strong application willingness among local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight upward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 3.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, the approximately 7.1% decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, and the high popularity of engineering majors, the dual benefits of enrollment expansion and examinee reduction slightly ease competition, but the improvement in school level and the appeal of popular majors push the ranking upward. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 28593, with a range of 28093–29093.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 28093–29093, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors as reach targets (requiring rankings significantly above the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Physics Category candidates with rankings within 28000 can prioritize competitive engineering majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information; those with rankings between 28500–29000 are advised to focus on moderate-difficulty majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, and Electrical Engineering; candidates with rankings near 29000 should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Majors at the Rongchang Campus typically have lower admission rankings than those at the Beibei Campus and can be preferred as safety options.

Education (A), Psychology (A), and Marxist Theory (A-), with outstanding teacher training and psychology disciplines, directly corresponding to History Category majors such as Education (Yan Yangchu Innovation Experimental Class), Ideological and Political Education, and Chinese Language and Literature, strongly attracting applications to related majors.
